name: python3-nacl
title: python3-nacl
description:
Python bindings to libsodium (Python 3)
PyNaCl is a Python binding to the Networking and Cryptography library (in the
form of libsodium), a crypto library with the stated goal of improving
usability, security and speed.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of pynacl.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-nacl because Python bindings to libsodium (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-nacl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-nacl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-nacl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
